member.name: T:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableConverter
member.summary: A JSON serializer for BindableVariable that serializes just the value.

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary`2
member.summary: A variable that contains a list, invoking events when items are added, removed or changed

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary`2.#ctor
member.summary: A variable that contains a list, invoking events when items are added, removed or changed

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary`2.ItemChanged
member.summary: Invoked when an item at a key is changed

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary`2.ItemRemoved
member.summary: Invoked when an item at a key is removed

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary`2.ItemAdded
member.summary: Invoked when an item at a key is added

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary`2.Item(`0)
member.summary: Setting will invoke ItemChanged if the key is already in the list and ItemAdded if not

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary`2.Add(`0,`1)
member.summary: Adds a key and value to the dictionary

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary`2.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes the item at a given key

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1
member.summary: A variable that contains a list, invoking events when items are added, removed or changed
member.typeparam: The type of elements in the list

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1.#ctor
member.summary: A variable that contains a list, invoking events when items are added, removed or changed
member.typeparam: The type of elements in the list

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1.ItemAdded
member.summary: Invoked when an item is added

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1.ItemRemoved
member.summary: Invoked when an item is removed: passes in the index and item

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1.ItemChanged
member.summary: Invoked when an item at an index is changed: passes in the index and item

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an item to the list, invoking ItemAdded
member.param: The item to add

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1.Add
member.summary: Adds an item to the list by creating an instance

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes the given item from the list, invoking ItemRemoved

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList`1.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Setting will invoke ItemChanged

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableVariable`1
member.summary: A variable that invokes an event when its value is changed

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableVariable`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: A variable that invokes an event when its value is changed

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableVariable`1.suppressed
member.summary: Whether this variable is blocked from invoking events

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableVariable`1.ValueChanged
member.summary: Invoked when the value of this variable is set

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableVariable`1.Value
member.summary: The value of the variable. Setting it will invoke ValueChanged

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.BindableVariable`1.Suppress
member.summary: Returns an object to suppress event invocations of this variable until disposed

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Interop.InteropExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods relating to interops

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Interop.InteropExtensions.OnSync
member.summary: Event invoked when a syncable is synced with the frontend

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.InteropExtensions.Sync(Edelweiss.Interop.ISyncable)
member.summary: Sync a syncable with the frontend

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.InteropExtensions.MakeTransform``2(Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList{``1},Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList{``0},System.Func{``0,``1})
member.summary: Makes one bindable list be a Select operation on another list while automatically syncing them
member.param: The source list
The transformation to apply to each element of the source list

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.InteropExtensions.MakeTransform``3(Edelweiss.Interop.BindableList{``2},Edelweiss.Interop.BindableDictionary{``0,``1},System.Func{``0,``1,``2})
member.summary: Makes one bindable list be a Select operation on a dictionary while automatically syncing them
member.param: The source dictionary
The transformation to apply to each key and value of the source dictionary

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Interop.ISyncable
member.summary: Interface all classes that need to sync with the UI must implement

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Interop.ISyncable.Syncables
member.summary: Dictionary of all syncable keys to their values

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.ISyncable.Name
member.summary: The key this syncable should be accessible with

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Interop.PluginInterop
member.summary: Base class for an interop class that defines methods that can be called by the UI

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Interop.PluginInterop.Interops
member.summary: The dictionary of all interop keys to their instances

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Interop.PluginInterop.OnLoad
member.summary: Called when the Interop is loaded

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Interop.SuppressBindable`1
member.summary: Disposable object that suppresses event invocations for its bindable

member.name: T:Edelweiss.MainInterop
member.summary: Interop for general purpose functions

member.name: M:Edelweiss.MainInterop.SetCelesteDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the Celeste Directory to the given value

member.name: M:Edelweiss.MainInterop.ChangeTab(Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab)
member.summary: Changes the currently selected tab

member.name: M:Edelweiss.MainInterop.Debug(System.Object)
member.summary: Logs a message through the main logger.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.MainInterop.GetLocalization(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the localization for a given key

member.name: T:Edelweiss.MainVars
member.summary: Class containing the main variables

member.name: F:Edelweiss.MainVars.Tabs
member.summary: The list of all defined tabs

member.name: F:Edelweiss.MainVars.PythonPlugins
member.summary: The dictionary of all python plugin keys to their paths

member.name: F:Edelweiss.MainVars.CurrentLanguage
member.summary: The currently selected language

member.name: F:Edelweiss.MainVars.TexturePaths
member.summary: The loaded texture keys to the absolute paths to the texture

member.name: E:Edelweiss.MainVars.TabSelected
member.summary: Invoked when a tab is selected

member.name: E:Edelweiss.MainVars.OnOpenWidget
member.summary: Invoked with the JSON source of the file when is called.

member.summary: Invoked with the JSON source of the file when is called.

member.summary: Invoked when is called

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Modding.MapDirectory
member.summary: A class containing map hierarchy data

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.MapDirectory.Name
member.summary: The name of the map type

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.MapDirectory.Directory
member.summary: The directory that the map type is put in

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData
member.summary: Class containing the data for a Celeste mod

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData.Name
member.summary: The name of the mod

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData.Mapper
member.summary: The name of the mapper

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData.RootDirectory
member.summary: The root directory which the mod will be placed in

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData.MapHierarchy
member.summary: The map hierarchy used

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData.MapHierarchyName
member.summary: This is not saved or set when loading from disk, only for setting the hierarchy when creating a new mod. Do not use.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData.Save
member.summary: Saves the mod to a folder in the Celeste directory

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a mod from the given path. Only works if the folder given contains edelweiss.meta.json

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Modding.ModData.ModDirectory
member.summary: The path to the mod folder

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingInterop
member.summary: Interop for the modding tab

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingInterop.ChangeMapPreset(System.String)
member.summary: Changes the current map preset, adds a new one if it doesn't already exist

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingInterop.RemoveMapPreset(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the given map preset

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingInterop.RenameMapPreset(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Renames the given map preset

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingInterop.CreateMod
member.summary: Opens a popup form for mod creation

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingInterop.SaveMod
member.summary: Saves the current mod to the Celeste mods directory

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingInterop.OpenMod
member.summary: Opens a file dialog to load a mod

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingInterop.LoadMod(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a mod from the given path and sets it to the current mod

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingTab.MapPresets
member.summary: The list of all map presets

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingTab.CurrentPreset
member.summary: The currently selected preset

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingTab.MapPresetNames
member.summary: The names of all map presets

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingTab.CurrentPresetName
member.summary: The name of the currently selected preset

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingTab.CreatingMod
member.summary: The mod that is currently being created

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingTab.CurrentMod
member.summary: The mod that is currently being edited

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Modding.ModdingTab.HasCurrentMod
member.summary: Whether a mod is currently being edited

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab
member.summary: Registers a custom UI tab, like the mapping tab.

member.summary: The key for the JSON file containing the layout of the tab

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab.ToolbarJSON
member.summary: The key for the JSON file containing the toolbar for the tab

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab.DisplayName
member.summary: The name that will be displayed in the editor

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab.LayoutWidget
member.summary: The JSON string for the widget

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab.ToolbarWidget
member.summary: The JSON string for the toolbar

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab.OnSelect
member.summary: Called when the user switches to this tab in the editor

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab.OnDeselect
member.summary: Called when the user switches away from this tab in the editor

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.CustomTab.HandleToolbarClick(System.String,Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject)
member.summary: Called when a toolbar action belonging to this tab's toolbar is triggered
member.param: The identifier for the action that was triggered
Any additional data that was requested in the toolbar's JSON file

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Plugins.Loadable
member.summary: Base class for all objects that need to be loaded by the PluginLoader but do not have any other function.

member.summary: Classes marked with this attribute will require that the specified types be loaded before they can be loaded
member.param: The types to load before this type

member.summary: Classes marked with this attribute will require that the specified types be loaded before they can be loaded
member.param: The types to load before this type

member.summary: Called when the corresponding Logger method is called

member.summary: Called when the corresponding Logger method is called

member.summary: Called when the corresponding Logger method is called

member.summary: Called when the corresponding Logger method is called

member.summary: Outputs an empty line in the log

member.summary: Outputs an empty line in the log

member.summary: Logs a warning

member.summary: Logs an error

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin
member.summary: The basic plugin class

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.ID
member.summary: The ID of the plugin. Every plugin needs to have a unique identifier.

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.Logger
member.summary: The logger instance associated with this plugin

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.Load
member.summary: Called when the plugin is loaded

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.PostSetupContent
member.summary: Called after all plugins have been loaded

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.GetLocalizationKey(System.String)
member.summary: Prefixes the plugin's ID to the given key.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.GetLocalization(System.String)
member.summary: Prefixes the plugin's ID to the given key and attempts to get the localization for it.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.CreateCache(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a cache file with the given filename at the cache directory for the plugin
member.param: The filename (with extension) for the cache file
member.returns: The stream of the cache file

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.CacheExists(System.String)
member.summary: Returns whether or not the given cache exists.
member.param: The cache path

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.Plugin.CachePath(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the absolute path to the cache with the given name

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoadAttribute
member.summary: Base class for attributes that add custom functionality to plugin loading

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoadAttribute.OnLoad(Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginRegistryObject)
member.summary: Called when the type attached to the attribute is loaded

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoadAttribute.PostLoadTypes(Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginRegistryObject)
member.summary: Called after all types in the plugin are loaded

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoadAttribute.PostLoadPlugins(Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginRegistryObject)
member.summary: Called after all plugins are loaded

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader
member.summary: Handles all plugin-related code.

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.PostLoadTypes
member.summary: Invoked after all types in a plugin are loaded

member.name: E:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.PostLoadPlugins
member.summary: Invoked after all plugins are loaded

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.localization
member.summary: Dictionary containing language keys to localization dictionary.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.LoadAssembly(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Loads all the types from an assembly.
member.returns: The plugin that the assembly defines

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.LoadPythonPlugins(Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset,System.String)
member.summary: Finds all the python plugins from a given directory and registers them with the frontend.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.LoadJsonFiles(Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset,System.String)
member.summary: Loads all the JSON files from a given directory.
member.param: The prefix that will be added to the key

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.LoadLangFiles(Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Loads the language files from a given directory.
member.param: The directory to load from
The prefix that will be added to the file key
True if the directory is a Celeste mod, false if it is an Edelweiss plugin

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.RequestJson(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the JSON content for the given key.
member.returns: An empty JSON object as a string if the key does not exist.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.RequestJObject(System.String)
member.summary: Requests the JSON for a given key and parses it.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginLoader.LoadBaseRegistryObjects(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Loads the base registry types for a given assembly.

member.summary: Contains the plugin asset for any given file and the path relative to the plugin asset

member.summary: The path of the file relative to the plugin asset

member.summary: The plugin asset that contains the file

member.summary: When the type itself is loaded

member.summary: After all types in the plugin are loaded

member.summary: After all plugins are loaded

member.summary: The height of the texture in pixels

member.summary: The position of the texture in the atlas

member.summary: The position of the texture in the atlas

member.summary: The width and height of the texture in the atlas

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Plugins.TextureData.atlasHeight
member.summary: The width and height of the texture in the atlas

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Plugins.TextureData.atlasOffsetX
member.summary: The position at which the texture starts in the atlas as compared to the padded texture

member.name: F:Edelweiss.Plugins.TextureData.atlasOffsetY
member.summary: The position at which the texture starts in the atlas as compared to the padded texture

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.TextureData.paddedWidth
member.summary: The width of the padded texture

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.TextureData.paddedHeight
member.summary: The height of the padded texture

member.summary: The plugin that this object is defined by

member.summary: The name of the object

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginRegistryObject.FullName
member.summary: The full identifier for the object, consisting of its defining plugin's ID and the object's name

member.summary: Called when the object is entered into the registry

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginRegistryObject.PostSetupContent
member.summary: Called after all plugins have been loaded.

member.summary: The value of the preference

member.summary: The stage at which the default value of the preference is set.

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginSaveablePreference.AllPrefs
member.summary: The loaded JSON object containing all currently loaded preferences

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginSaveablePreference.SetDefaultValue
member.summary: Called if the preference was not found in the saved preferences.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Plugins.PluginSaveablePreference.PrepForSave
member.summary: Called before the preference is saved, to perform tasks necessary to save correctly

member.name: T:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.IRegistryObject
member.summary: An interface that all types to be stored in the registry must implement

member.name: M:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.IRegistryObject.OnRegister
member.summary: Called when the object is added to the registry

member.name: T:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.BaseRegistryObjectAttribute
member.summary: Types marked with this attribute are "base" objects: all types inheriting from them are stored in their list.

member.name: T:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.Registry
member.summary: Contains all registry objects categorised into their respective registry lists

member.name: F:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.Registry.registry
member.summary: The whole registry

member.name: F:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.Registry.allRegisteredTypes
member.summary: The list of all types that have been added to the registry, regardless of type

member.name: M:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.Registry.ForAll``1(System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Performs an action for all registered objects of a given type

member.name: T:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.RegistryList`1
member.summary: A list of registry objects. Stores an integer ID, an instance of the type, and the type itself.
member.typeparam: The type that is stored in the list

member.name: M:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.RegistryList`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an instance to the list
member.param: An instance of the object to add

member.name: M:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.RegistryList`1.GetValue(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the instance of a particular ID

member.name: M:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.RegistryList`1.GetValue(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the instance of a particular type

member.name: M:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.RegistryList`1.GetValue``1
member.summary: Gets the instance of a particular type and casts it to the given type

member.name: M:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.RegistryList`1.GetIndex(`0)
member.summary: Gets the ID of a particular instance

member.name: P:Edelweiss.RegistryTypes.RegistryList`1.Count
member.summary: The number of entries in the list

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.EdelweissUtils.TryGetCustomAttribute``1(System.Reflection.MemberInfo,``0@)
member.typeparam: The type of attribute to get
member.returns: Whether the member has the attribute

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.EdelweissUtils.GetPluginAssetsFromDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Gets all the directories and zip files in a directory, in that order and converts them to plugin assets

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.EdelweissUtils.Stream(System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive)
member.summary: Exposes the private stream of a given zip archive

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.EdelweissUtils.Path(System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive)
member.summary: Returns the path to a given zip archive

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.EdelweissUtils.IsSubclassOfRawGeneric(System.Type,System.Type)
member.summary: Alternative version of that supports raw generic types (generic types without any type parameters).
member.param: The base type class for which the check is made.
To type to determine for whether it derives from .

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Utils.Language
member.summary: Handles all localization-related code

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.Language.GetText(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the localization for a given key
member.returns: The localization if it exists, the key itself if it doesn't

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.Language.GetTextOrDefault(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the localization for a given key and the default value if it doesn't exist.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.Language.TryGetText(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Attempts to get the localization for a given key.
member.returns: Whether or not the localization exists.

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset
member.summary: An object that can contain either a zip file or a directory

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.IsZipFile
member.summary: Whether or not this asset is a zip file

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.AssetPath
member.summary: The path to the directory this asset contains if it is not a zip file

member.name: P:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.PluginArchive
member.summary: The archive this asset contains if it is a zip file

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.op_Implicit(System.String)~Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset
member.summary: Converts a path to a PluginAsset. If the path is a file, it is treated as a zip. If the path is a directory, the asset is treated as a directory.

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.op_Implicit(System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive)~Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset
member.summary: Converts a zip archive into a plugin asset

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.DirExists(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the asset contains a directory with the given path

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.FileExists(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the asset contains a file with the given path

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.GetFiles(System.String,System.IO.SearchOption)
member.summary: Returns all the files in the asset matching a given pattern

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.GetFiles(System.String,System.String,System.IO.SearchOption)
member.summary: Returns all the files in the asset matching a given pattern and that are in the given path

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.GetStream(System.String)
member.summary: Opens the entry with the given path and returns the stream

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.PluginAsset.ToString
member.summary: Returns the directory if the asset is a directory and the path to the zip archive if it is a zip file.

member.name: T:Edelweiss.Utils.UI
member.summary: UI utilities

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.UI.OpenPopupWidget(System.String)
member.summary: Opens a popup widget taking the data from the given key
member.param: The resource key for the widget data

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.UI.OpenFileDialog(System.String)
member.summary: Opens a popup file dialog taking the data from the given key
member.param: The resource key for the file dialog

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.UI.OpenFileDialog(Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject)
member.summary: Opens a popup file dialog using the given JObject as the source

member.name: M:Edelweiss.Utils.UI.ShowPopup(System.String)
member.summary: Opens a toast-style popup with the given text
member.param: Either the localization key for the text, or a text literal prefixed with @
